answer:
To find the time for light to travel 1 cm, use the formula:

\[
\text{Time} = \frac{\text{Distance}}{\text{Speed}} = \frac{1 \text{ cm}}{3.0 \times 10^8 \text{ m/sec}} = \frac{0.01 \text{ m}}{3.0 \times 10^8 \text{ m/sec}} = 3.3 \times 10^{-11} \text{ sec}
\]

Thus, the correct answer is:

\[
\boxed{J}
\]
